Current plan & upgrade

Starter
$0/mo
For individuals and small projects.
  • Up to 50 runs/month
  • 1 browser worker

Popular
Pro
$49/mo
For growing teams and CI pipelines.
  • Unlimited runs
  • 5 browser workers
  • 90-day history
  • Priority heal queue
Enterprise
$199/mo
For large orgs with custom SLAs.
  • Everything in Pro
  • Dedicated workers
  • SSO + audit log
  • SLA guarantee
